extensionDescription.message: Monitors Redmine sessions and warns when session expires to prevent data loss

sessionExpiredWarning.message: Warning! User session has expired. Saving form data may result in data loss.
sessionExpiredWarning.description: Warning message displayed in the banner when session expires

blacklistHelp.message: Blacklist Mode: Extension will work on all sites EXCEPT those in the list below.

whitelistHelp.message: Whitelist Mode: Extension will work ONLY on sites in the list below.

domainsHelp.message: Add domains to include or exclude based on the selected mode. You can use wildcards (e.g., *.example.com).

settingsSaved.description: Message shown when settings are saved

domainAlreadyExists.message: This domain already exists in the list.
domainAlreadyExists.description: Error message when trying to add duplicate domain
